name: Scalloped Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the white sauce and salt in a 1-1/2 quart casserole dish.
2. Add the potato slices, arranging them evenly.
3. Sprinkle the bread crumbs on top (optional).
4. Microwave for 9 minutes on high.
5. Stir the potatoes and continue cooking for an additional 9 to 10 minutes on high or until the potatoes are tender and reach an internal temperature of about 150°F.
6. Let stand for 2 minutes before serving.
